QF.id: I Clearing Settlement and Risk Management_31

answer.text: All open positions of clearing members (both buy and sell)

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Initial margin is payable on ALL open positions — both buy (long) and sell (short). The CC collects from CMs, CMs from TMs, and TMs from clients. **The Trap:** Margins are on ALL positions, not just one direction. **Cross-Exam Context:** Initial margin applicability is tested in Series I and VIII. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** SPAN considers the entire portfolio, so offsetting positions may result in lower total margin than the sum of individual margins.
